name: Tucker Albachs Apartment Enhanced
description: After dealing with Tucker Albach, her Apartment was listed under her next of kin, ( secretly changed to V ) SO CONGRATS on your new Apartment given to you by your loving family member ! It has been Enhanced with Better Lighting, Roof AV Landing Pad and even your own Room catered to its Style ! Truthfully a place worthy of V, and not Tucker Albach...
